task_completion.description: The Fells Loop dataset is opened and visible in the application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A map or list view showing 'Fells Loop' data, such as waypoints or tracks, loaded in a GPS/GIS application.

task_completion.description: The waypoints list is sorted in alphabetical order.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A waypoint list or table where the waypoint names are clearly sorted from A to Z.

task_completion.description: The first three waypoints in the alphabetically sorted list are selected for editing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The first three items in the sorted waypoint list are highlighted or selected, or their properties dialog is open.

task_completion.description: A 200-meter proximity alert radius is set for the selected waypoints.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A properties or proximity alert dialog showing a distance/radius value of 200 meters (or equivalent) being applied to the waypoints.

task_completion.description: The dataset is exported as a GPX file to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' or 'Export' dialog showing the file name 'fells_proximity_alerts.gpx' and the destination folder 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\', or a file explorer window confirming the file's creation at this path.

integrity.description: The agent used the application's GUI to set proximity alerts and export the dataset.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the GPS/GIS software's menus, lists, and dialog boxes rather than terminal commands.

integrity.description: The export was performed through the application, not by manually creating a file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The save/export dialog belongs to the GPS/GIS application, and there is no evidence of a text editor being used to manually write GPX XML data.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output path is C:\Users\Docker\Documents\fells_proximity_alerts.gpx. The proximity alert value must be 200 meters (a tolerance of ±5m is acceptable, so 195-205m). Exactly 3 waypoints must have this proximity alert set.
